evidence: "One of the all time classic SciFi movies. Highly recommended."
"Singing, dancing, scenery. We need MORE movies like this."
"This was a disappointment from beginning to end."
"The action is great and isn't overwhelmed by the 'love' story."
"The effects and photography were terrific, but this movie left me a bit flat."
"Average 1950s B style SciFi. Not great but not terrible."
"Wolverine is one of my favorite characters."
"I remember seeing this at the drive-in."
"The animation is top notch and the story is good."
"This was a disappointment from beginning to end."
"Not as good as expected it to be."

summary: The user enjoys sci-fi and campy films with a preference for fast pacing and visual spectacle. They show a low sensitivity to production quality and emotional resonance, indicating a focus on entertainment rather than depth.
